What People Say

Customer Reviews

★★★★★ 4.9

"Pulled up with my Charger looking rough after a long winter — salt stains, grime everywhere. Joshi had it looking like it just left the showroom. Dude takes his time and actually cares about the work. Premium package is a must."

Devon M.
2022 Dodge Charger · Premium Package
★★★★½ 4.7

"I was skeptical at first but the results speak for themselves. My SUV interior had crumbs and stains I thought were permanent. All gone. Super responsive and easy to book. Will definitely be back."

Kayla T.
2020 Toyota RAV4 · Interior Premium
★★★★★ 5.0

"Got the exterior premium before a road trip and the clay bar + wax made my hood look like glass. Hadn't seen my paint look that clean since I bought it. Best $100 I've spent on my car."

Marcus R.
2019 Honda Civic · Exterior Premium
★★★★½ 4.6

"My headlights were so foggy I could barely see at night. After the light restoration they're completely clear — looks like I got brand new ones. Quick, affordable, and no BS. Highly recommend."

Priya S.
2017 BMW 3 Series · Light Restoration
